verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Makin' a list of all of the good things You've done for me Lord, I've never been one to complain But right now I'm lost And I can't find my way My world's come apart And it's breakin' my heart But it helps to know Your heart is breakin' too

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I cry, You cry When I hurt, You hurt When I've lost someone It takes a piece of You, too And when I fall on my face You fill me with grace 'Cause nothin' breaks Your heart Or tears You apart like when I cry

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Alone in the dark, face in my hands, Crying out to You Lord, there's never been a time in my life There's so much at stake, there's so much to lose But I trust it to You, You'll bring me through And it helps me to know that I'm not alone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're the one Who calmed the raging sea You're the one Who made the blind to see You looked through all of heaven and eternity And through it all you saw me…
